description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms condo for sale with a floorsize of 53.01 squaremeters, located on the 34th floor, at Whizdom Essence
Sukhumvit building, in the popular Phra Khanong district near BTS Punnawithi. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2019
 * Security cameras
 * Covered car park
 * Gym
 * Open car park
 * 24-hours security
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Gym
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * Running track
 * Modern jacuzzi




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Our fast, professional, and multilingual team focuses on residential properties for rent and sell across Thailand in Bangkok,
Phuket, Pattaya, Hua Hin, Koh Samui, Chiang Mai and many other locations. We are one of the leading real estate agents in Thailand
and can offer you all available rental and sale units.

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.

1 Kitchen


1 Dining Room


1 Living Room


Multi-purpose Area


Fully equipped with air conditioning and sanitary ware in all rooms
